{{Quote|We were good men once…|Muptupp|<ref name="Droids (1994) 2">[[Droids (1994) 2|''Droids'' (1994) 2]]</ref>}}
'''Muptupp''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huba]] in the [[Indobok Pirates]]. Formerly a cook along with the rest of the gang, he was forced to work in a crystal mine after [[Olag Greck]] framed the chefs for an attempted poisoning of [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. After escaping the mine, he helped steal the ''[[Tharen Wayfarer]]'' from the [[Pitareeze family]]. When Huba refused to receive the [[Captain's pendant]] from [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] after a [[vump-shugga]] race, Muptupp enforced the code that stated that refusal of the pendant constituted forfeiture of captaincy.
